name: Factory Management
description: Complete factory and manufacturing management — track machines, production lines, products, workers, shifts, and quality checks with full operational oversight.
author: AENEWS

capabilities.name: searchMachines
capabilities.description: Search for machines by name, type, status, or location

capabilities.name: createProductionOrder
capabilities.description: Create a new production order for a product

capabilities.name: getProduct
capabilities.description: Get product by ID with full details and inventory

capabilities.name: updateWorker
capabilities.description: Update worker profile, skills, and assignment

capabilities.name: deleteMachine
capabilities.description: Remove a machine from the factory system

capabilities.name: getProductionLine
capabilities.description: Get production line by ID with status and throughput

capabilities.name: searchWorkers
capabilities.description: Search for workers by name, role, or shift

permissions.name: Read
permissions.description: Read factory data including machines, production lines, and products

permissions.name: Write
permissions.description: Create/Update machines, production orders, workers, and products

permissions.name: Delete
permissions.description: Delete machines, production records, and products

permissions.name: Admin
permissions.description: Full factory administration including settings and user management

events.description: New machine registered in the factory
Quality check completed for a product
